programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: hen a Jane Doe homeless lady is murdered Chris vows to find out who she is Meanwhile Chris and Mary Beth shoot a recruiting commercial for the NYPD while Mary Beth is fighting a nasty cold

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: While working a case Starsky learns that Hutchs new girlfriend Gillian is a high class prostitute working for some criminals theyre investigating

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: After stunt pilot Vinnie crashes attempting to land on a driving truck studio boss Philip Maurice and his deputy Simon Sayes hire Santini Air to save the film project String refuses such a merely commercial job even as wing-man on the ground but Dom insists to accept and do the flying to prove if he still can at his age stating even if it kills him He even accepts a contract clause to pay for the studio losses if he fails which he couldnt afford String asks Archangel to stop Dom by FIRMs government pull but hearing Maurice is involved he convinces String to take over as thats an international crime mastermind who caused the death of an agent Michael cares about and must plan the stunt as a cover for a major robbery Racing against time they work out it must be a government gold transport heist and confront the fiends

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan track down a box used to perform a dangerous magic trick

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: While Froy waits on news from his lawyer about his warrant in Texas he considers taking matters into his own hands Lou and Froy bust some slick moves in an attempt to wrangle a car from a debtor who is prepared to battle Then when one woman behaves like a child Matt puts her in timeout but worries he may have gone too far And finally Lou Matt and Froy take on an jealous husband with deadly aim

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy head to Texas to clear Froys name but things take a turn for the worse and Froy finds himself in more trouble than he can handle Back in LA Lou and Lyndah repo a car from a deceptive charity worker and Lou is left to protect the girls from two knife wielding debtors who will go to any lengths to keep their vehicles

programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: Bells of San Angelo

programme.title: The Hanging Tree
programme.desc: Joseph a doctor keeps dominating peoples lives He frees a robber Rune from getting hanged; and forces his charge on him too as compensation Things change when Elizabeth enters Josephs life

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa gets struck with jealousy because of Flora MacMichael and tries to take it out on her apple tree

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger invests in Lady Linda a lovesick racehorse that wont run so its Mister Ed the love doctor to the rescue

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: George Burns is offering 25000 for a great new novelty act so Wilbur begs Mister Ed to talk to Mr Burns

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark interrupt two young men stealing horses Lucas is forced to defend himself and shoots and kills one of the men He is one of Ma Boyles sons The Boyles are a mountain family who live by their own laws and Micah foresees trouble When the clan arrives in town they are set on hanging the man responsible for the killing

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Seven escaped prisoners terrorize the town of North Fork The leader has a personal grudge against Lucas McCain that he must settle before leaving the town

programme.title: Gunsmoke S09E06 My Sisters Keeper
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S09E06 My Sisters Keeper

programme.title: Bonanza 310
programme.desc: Bonanza 310

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: When a magician makes Arte disappear Jim must travel to another dimension to find him What his journey back in time reveals is a plot to change the outcome of the Civil War

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet 804
programme.desc: Dragnet 804

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The police are looking for a young fugitive who was dating the daughter of a Hungarian family that Dr Kimble is staying with As the police stake out their residence Dr Kimble discovers her father is also running from a crime he was accused of

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike battles rough weather sharks bullets and even a giant clam as he searches for a deep-water manganese deposit which could be invaluable to the US Government

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Two con artist attempt to steal the fortune of a rich man they accidentally killed by creating a fake seance for his blind wife but not everything goes to plan

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Small-time crook Mickey aspires to work as a runner for drug lord Joey Stregga To achieve this aim Mickey sets up his innocent ex-hooker girlfriend Pearl on a date with Stregga but pays heavily for betraying her pure love for him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric feels responsible for an elderly woman who is committed to a mental institution by her daughter after she reports to the police she saw Eric in his werewolf form He takes a job as a custodian at the institution to look after her

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: To apprehend a murderer who is supposedly killing in the name of God Nick must overcome his vampire fear of the cross

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A devious antiques dealer uses a magic lantern to travel back to the Civil War so he can steal artifacts from dead soldiers

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Hanks twin brother arrives and Greta enlists him to help bump off her new husband Meanwhile Gretas sister and her husband drop in for a surprise visit

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: The year is 1918 During World War I somewhere in France its the 49th day of continuous battle on the front lines Lieutenant Martin Kalthrob doesnt want to be in the army anymore and asks his father General Kalthrob for a discharge His father refuses but says he will transfer him to the rear if he leads a patrol to the German lines and fix the broken communication line When he proves himself to be a coward his father orders a court martial with penalty of death by firing squad

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Amos invites their old neighbors to California for a visit including Lukes old girlfriend Elvira Kate tries to hide her jealousy during the reminiscing of old times

programme.title: Smart 516
programme.desc: Smart 516

programme.title: Smart 506
programme.desc: Smart 506

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ Callie and Samantha stumble upon Steigers pet project a call girl operation run out of a dating service that blackmails its clients with compromising photographs But SCAT isnt the only party interested in getting that briefcase of evidence back from BJ

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger influences Wilbur to grow a mustache and Carol insists that he shave it Meanwhile Ed wants Wilbur to install a shower in the barn

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Circumstantial evidence leads Carol to suspect that Wilbur is seeing another woman

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The aristocratic Colonel Klink fails a routine physical exam and lands a combat assignment at the Russian front! Fearing a hard-line replacement at Stalag 13 the men must do all they can to rescind Klinks marching papers

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans plan to relieve the bombing pressure on London with a trap hinges on Carters ability to remember the name of a town - Leadingham

programme.title: Mchale 331
programme.desc: Mchale 331

programme.title: Mchale 322
programme.desc: Mchale 322

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers favorite actress visits the base

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer gets assigned to MP duty

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan rescues a native woman from drowning which according her custom makes her his slave But soon a fellow tribesman comes to the island and challenges Gilligan for her in a fight to the death

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A missing military jet pack washes up on the island and The Professor tries to figure out a way to use it for their rescue

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The Farmers Association is having its fall dance and Grandpa doesnt want to take Flora MacMichael until Little Luke tells him about the box supper that Flora is bringing

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Maurice a famous French chef and chemist has created something world-changing and wants to distribute it through Jonathans company but before he can tell Jonathan about it he is killed and his recipes stolen

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: When his boss goes out of town Michael volunteers Stephanie to run her girl scout troupe but the girls arent interested in Stephanies shallow and materialistic ways and Stephanie is horrified to learn shes expected to go camping with them

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick goes to a dude ranch for his vacation

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: In order to research for an article on group therapy she is doing Polly takes along MacGillis to a group therapy weekend where in order to write the article they are required to participate Elizabeth holds a small party while the two are out of the house which gets out of control

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The hungry castaways find a wild duck on the island but they dont know whether to use it as food or attach a message to him and hope for rescue

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Investigating the murder of the agencys previous owner Mitch Garner and Ryan get involved with jewel smugglers a mysterious speedboat that is always speeding around Baywatch and a body that wont stay dead

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy repo a car from a girl whose roommate has been keeping two very big secrets Sonia and Froys repo from a creepy husband reveals some incriminating evidence to his wife and when Lou and Sonia cant locate their target car Lou comes up with a master plan that requires some back-up TV-14-DLS

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: While attempting a repo of a green energy bio-diesel vehicle Froys lack of knowledge of the vehicles specialized fuel system sets the bus ablaze - and when his error causes it to explode he and Matt abandon buildersowners Mickie and Joey in the middle of the desert

programme.title: THE HILLSIDE STRANGLERS
programme.desc: Kenneth is obsessed with the police he moves to LA with his cousin Angelo convinces him to start a prostitution business Frustrated decide on revenge feeling a great pleasure with her death The two cousins become addicted to death

programme.title: The Police Connection
programme.desc: When a “mad bomber” THE RIFLEMAN himself Chuck Connors – as the police computer classifies his suspect type – blows up a high school and a hospital Lieutenant Geronimo Minneli Vince Edwards TV’s BEN CASEY is on his trail He may have a witness in a young mute woman who was raped at the hospital just before the explosion but she is too ashamed to identify her attacker In any case Minneli reasons that it is unlikely that the bomber would stop to rape a woman after planting the bomb and that the rapist and the bomber are likely different people; therefore the rapist himself might be the only one who can help the police catch him Since the police do not know the bomber’s modus operandi but they do know the rapists Minneli starts questioning his past victims

programme.title: Hercules 222
programme.desc: Hercules 222

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: An Irish guide finds the possible burial location of Mael a Taelon that came to Earth 2000 years ago It is crucial for the Taelons to find his research material

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Suzanne does some unauthorized research on a new kind of grain that will grow in any climate The billionaire who invented wants to sell it to the world Thinking poorer countries will be given money by richer countries But the aliens have their own plans for the grain after placing a new deadly poison in the grain they take over the body of the billionaire who suddenly offers it free to the world

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A rock singer tries to run away from the consequences of the morbid overtones in the lyrics of his songs after two fans committ suicide to the suggestions therein

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Can Will escape the wrath of guardians to a lost Mayan temple within the swamp when he is forced to be an unwilling guide

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Koenig is transported to another world and another time Once there he finds that he has to choose between returning to his life and companions on the moon and the love of a beautiful girl

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Time-displaced astronaut Taylor and the mute Nova[a] travel through the desert of the Forbidden Zone in search of a new life away from Ape City Without warning fire shoots up from the ground and chasms open Confused by this Taylor investigates a cliff wall and disappears through it Unable to reach him Nova is left alone

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke get jobs hauling wrecked cars to demolition derby operator Augie Detweiller unaware he and Boss have schemed to hide stolen engines under the hood When they are suspected of smuggling the stolen engines into Hazzard Bo agrees to become a driver in an upcoming event to find out the truth

programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: In order to stop a psychotic priest killer Lt Stone goes undercover as a Roman Catholic priest The victims were all clergymen who studied at the same seminary

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The economy of the small African country of Ghalea is threatened by a mass counterfeiting scheme directed by Walter DuBruis one of the countrys richest financier

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate abuse to babies One mother claims her child fell down the stairs but they find the father beat the child The baby dies The parents never wanted the child

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon come up with the idea of using dogs to sniff out marijuana smugglers Theyll have to find a dog and demonstrate it works while enduring their colleagues skepticism of the wild idea

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: The year is 1918 During World War I somewhere in France its the 49th day of continuous battle on the front lines Lieutenant Martin Kalthrob doesnt want to be in the army anymore and asks his father General Kalthrob for a discharge His father refuses but says he will transfer him to the rear if he leads a patrol to the German lines and fix the broken communication line When he proves himself to be a coward his father orders a court martial with penalty of death by firing squad

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Teenage Halloween pranksters Shari Belafonte-Harper LeVar Burton Lee Montgomery revive a 300-year-old witch and some of her ghoul friends

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Chapman v. Scott MacDonald

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The powerful liberty stone protects Aloar from all invaders by creating the spidereen whirlpool Gillian brings the league to this planet to see his old magician friend Axilar and to use the stone to seek Audrics whereabouts

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals the famous Lippizaner Stallions earning 4 million in platinum bars from an Arab At the end VENOM loses the money by a laser shot from Shark and they all quickly flee in Piranha

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is manipulating a tribe of aboriginals with holographic projections of flying rocks The aboriginals think its their god Mimi VENOM is after the secret treasure chamber of Mimi Scott and T-Bob get mixed up with the aboriginals when they think T-Bob is representing their Mimi god At the end Brad saves the day with his hocus pocus mask

programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap
